name: Ellis Cohen
description:
[MLM / T4T] ── .✦ Despite the occasional attitude, he was perceived as the neighbourhood's little angel, all about helping people and keeping his parents proud. Behind closed doors though, the Cohen household was nothing like their well-maintained facade—and Ellis was no saint, either.

You've thought that for some time but after discovering his 𝕍enus account while browsing through the online sex working site, it was further proven to you. That discovery though, was an accident you just couldn't look away from.

MY LINKS > curiouscat ✭ discord server ✭ kinktober recs 🔗

i might do kinktober for funsies, so if you have something you want to see mw write, the form's link is above or on the profile <3 btw the intro message is kinda long lol
